capital_seat_bar.purpose: L1 sim edge / paper-path eligibility for the $3k sleeve
required: defined-risk preferred or explicit worst-case bound fitting sleeve
non-vacuous after-cost edge on dual cost axes
B3 density / multi-regime evidence appropriate to claim
competitive max-loss and window DD versus absolute gates
proxy-only or underlying-only evidence cannot earn L1

choice_rule: Closed families and prior NEXT are context, not allowlists. Reopen only with a named new evidence class or repaired capability. Operational completion is separate from strategy advancement. Use discovery_bar for F0→F1/F1→F2 signals and capital_seat_bar for L1/paper seats; discovery survivors never earn L1 alone. A blocked observed-option route blocks only dependent claims and cannot alone justify stop while another historical route remains informative. After two consecutive epoch wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED, pivot mechanism/evidence class; after three, stop the burst and reassess search design/data. Prior-epoch DIMINISHING_RETURNS is superseded once configs/search_epoch.json marks reassessment_complete. Honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid after open routes are assessed for material novelty.
closed_families: MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: exact SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA first-Friday-control next-session five-session 60/40 10-bps three-month-block-bootstrap specification
ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_POLICY_F0: exact ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_PCS_V1 global-one-unit fixed-priority catalog-14-DTE PCS implementation across the frozen eight-symbol panel and dual cost axes

discovery_bar.notes: Discovery survivors are research signals only until the capital-seat bar clears; proxy-only or underlying-only evidence cannot grant paper eligibility.
discovery_bar.purpose: Signal-only progress for F0→F1 and F1→F2 on labeled proxy or claim-appropriate data
required: train before untouched holdout when claiming F2

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: TSLL_RELATIVE_DISLOCATION_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / TSLL_TSLA_5D_TRACKING_SHORTFALL_REBOUND: residual r_TSLL(5d)-2*r_TSLA(5d) <= -4%; next-session entry; five-session hold; non-overlapping treated episodes; earlier neutral-residual controls in [-1%,+1%] matched without replacement within frozen TSLA-return, trend-distance, calendar-distance, and disjoint-window bounds; chronological train-only decision before holdout or option pricing; future one-lot 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call debit context only with capital_fit_usd=100, max_loss_usd=100 structural width bound before closing friction, max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: A path-dependent five-session TSLL tracking shortfall versus twice TSLA's five-session return may reflect a transient leveraged-ETF rebalance/noise dislocation that rebounds when TSLA remains above a fully warmed SMA100 and its five-session return is at least -5%.
recent_runs.next: ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_POLICY_F0: in the next zero-input BUILD wake, freeze one concrete chronological defined-risk signal stream with named structures, symbols, DNA provenance, and no closed-family retunes; predeclare one-open-risk-unit, correlation/symbol-cluster cap, and concurrency rules; compare the capped policy with the identical uncapped stream on train only under labeled dual-cost/path-realism semantics; require non-vacuous drawdown improvement and non-negative expectancy; reserve untouched holdout unless train passes; discovery bar only, with no registry auto-promote, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Canonical family ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_POLICY_F0, candidate ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_PCS_V1, class PORTFOLIO_CADENCE_CONCENTRATION_CONTROL: one-lot catalog 14-DTE $2-wide lagged PCS on AAPL, AMD, BAC, F, PLTR, SMCI, SOFI, and TSLL; fixed one-global-unit admission, fixed outcome-free priority, unchanged management, dual train cost axes, and unread holdout.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Simultaneous bullish and neutral put-credit-spread signals create hidden concentration; a deterministic global one-open-risk-unit admission policy with outcome-free symbol priority was tested for preserving per-trade expectancy while reducing marked portfolio drawdown.
recent_runs.next: MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_DRIFT_F0: in the next zero-input BUILD wake, run a train-only third-Friday monthly-OPEX/post-expiry underlying drift study on liquid broad indexes with outcome-free same-month non-OPEX-Friday controls; require non-vacuous after-cost drift, positive paired excess, and a positive dependence-aware uncertainty lower bound before any option pricing or holdout read; do not reopen cadence, tracking-shortfall, monthly cross-section, VRP, TOM, or session-time closed families; no registry auto-promote, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: equal-weight SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA adjusted-close basket; holiday-adjusted third-Friday OPEX; next-session entry; five-session hold; first-Friday same-month paired control; chronological first 60% train only; labeled 10-bps underlying round-trip sensitivity; future one-lot 14-DTE $2-wide bull-call structural context only with capital_fit_usd=max_loss_usd=200 and max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Monthly index-option expiration may unwind dealer hedges and rebalance index exposure, creating a short positive broad-index drift after third-Friday OPEX relative to an outcome-free same-month first-Friday control.
recent_runs.next: SEARCH_BURST_STOP_REASSESS_2026-07-15: stop active-epoch strategy-search volume after three consecutive no-advance wakes. Write a search-design/data reassessment that inventories open non-quarantined mechanisms and independent evidence classes, separates mechanism weakness from sample-information and fixed-panel limits, and names at most one successor-epoch success definition or DIMINISHING_RETURNS. Do not read this holdout, price its options, reopen nearby OPEX/cadence/tracking/cross-section/VRP/TOM/session families, treat the three-date option archive as edge, or take paper/shadow/arm/broker/live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / TIME_SERIES_20D_BREAKOUT_CONTINUATION on the frozen AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, TSLA adjusted-close panel; next-session entry after the completed-bar signal; prior-only same-symbol controls matched without replacement; non-overlapping pair windows; chronological 60/40 blueprint split; one-lot future 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call debit spread is structural only, capital_fit_usd=max_loss_usd=100, max_lots=1 before closing friction.

recent_runs.next: BREAKOUT_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT_ONCE: reconstruct the exact frozen 281 blueprints under unchanged panel, signal, match bounds, horizon, and 20-bps label; select the reserved final 113 without retuning; read outcomes exactly once; decide F1 to F2 advance or FAMILY_CLOSED under the unchanged pooled discovery gate; mandatorily report per-symbol, leave-one-symbol-out, and chronological-tertile concentration diagnostics as non-gating context; price no options unless holdout advances; no registry, seat, paper, shadow, arm, broker, or live.

recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and trend-following demand may sustain ten-session continuation after a completed close at least 2% above the prior completed 20-session high while above a fully warmed prior-completed SMA100.
recent_runs.next: BREAKOUT_F2_OPTION_PAYOFF_FREEZE: freeze one exact listed-expiry/strike/debit/management 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call specification on only the original 168 development rows; require non-vacuous positive absolute after-cost option PnL under adverse fixed-dollar and percentage multi-leg costs, one-lot max loss <=$300, window max DD <=$75, listing availability, symbol/time concentration, a hard 10-session primary stop, and no same-bar reentry; use the opened 113 only as labeled secondary stress without retuning; keep evidence L0/no L1 and require fresh live-clock paper before F4.

observed_historical_option_replay.blocked_reason: no broad historical observed option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins
observed_historical_option_replay.claim_limit: three dates validate capture/join plumbing or begin cost calibration; they do not establish strategy edge or L1

research_routes.rule: A blocked observed-option route blocks only observed-option claims. Archive density alone cannot justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another independent route remains informative; honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid.

search_epoch.epoch_success_definition: Advance MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 from F1_TRAIN to F2_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT under the unchanged pooled discovery gate, or close the exact family; no option stage or capital seat unless F2 first advances.

strategy_run_contract.rule: Every BUILD wake must declare economic_mechanism, candidate_or_family_scope, funnel_stage_before/after, falsifier, and exactly one strategy outcome. Capability/tooling alone is not strategy progress unless the unlocked experiment is exercised in-wake to STRATEGY_ADVANCED or FAMILY_CLOSED via BLOCKER_REMOVED_AND_RETESTED. STRATEGY_ADVANCED at F0→F1 may use discovery_bar when claim scope is labeled L0 discovery; capital path/L1 still requires capital_seat_bar.
